title: New Old Flowers For Sniffers
description: Sniffers can now dig up the removed red rose, pocket edition's blue rose and a new Bobuar rose
body:
# Requires a resource pack - [download it here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-resource-pack)

Adds removed flowers back to Minecraft through the sniffer. 
The rose and blue rose from pocket edition have been re-added to the game. There is also a new purple Bobuar rose.
The sniffer will now have a chance to dig up either one of these roses or their normal loot (Pitcher Pod and Torchflower Seeds)
![All added rose textures next to each other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31474b08fcd92160cb4d4e0ea133cf4624aad4c.png)

![The added flowers in a diagonal line, going away from camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2029c68fcb642657278b9faadfd6b95939f97363.png)

## **Installation**
This datapack has multiple files to download and install depending on what you need it to do. 

The main datapack (which you can download on this page) is **required** to get the sniffers to be able to dig up the new flowers and so you can place and destroy them.

A resource pack is also **required** to load in the custom textures. If you're using this datapack on a server, everyone will need to install this resource pack to see the new roses. (without this the roses will look like item frames) The resourse pack can be [downloaded here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-resource-pack). 

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-resource-pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-resource-pack)

### **Optional Functionality**

To install these extra features, download the datapacks and place them in your datapack folder along with the main datapack. 

#### **Give Flower command**
There is also a give flower command that you can gain access to by installing [this datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-give-flowers) along with the main datapack. This command will give you all three of the new roses. This is useful in creative mode because you don't have to wait for a sniffer to dig them up. 

COMMAND: /function new_old_flowers_for_sniffers:give_flower

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-give-flowers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-give-flowers)

#### **Uninstall**
I have also made [this datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-uninstall) which gives the player an uninstall command that removes all roses within loaded chunks. This is useful if the main datapack is going to be removed because removing the main datapack will prevent roses from being destroyed and placed in the normal way. 


This command will only remove roses in loaded chunks so you will have to go to each area where flowers have been placed and run the command multiple times.

It will also not remove the roses from players' inventories or chests and if these are placed, without the main datapack, an invisible item frame will appear that can only be destroyed through commands or in creative mode. 

COMMAND: /function new_old_flowers_for_sniffers_uninstall:uninstall

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-uninstall](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-old-flowers-for-sniffers-uninstall)

# Problem? - BobuarThereIsSomethingWrongWithYourThing@outlook.com
